title: Scratchpad
description: A singleton notes window whose content lives on the broker (via ctx.serverStore), so it is shared across every browser on this broker and survives a reload or cache clear. Notes are organized as internal tabs, each a CodeMirror editor built on the editor mod's single shared CM build (requires: ['editor']). Every save keeps a bounded server-side revision history, browsable + restorable from a History panel. Writes reuse the single-active-client lease: a non-active browser reads but is read-only until it becomes active.
author: JohnConnorNPC
